description: Machine-readable freeze for the shared OPL managed-runtime three-layer owner envelope across admitted domains. It fixes the boundary between provider-backed runtime ownership, OPL typed queue/control-plane ownership, domain supervision ownership, and concrete executor ownership.

owner_semantics.runtime_owner: Provider-backed family runtime owner responsible for wakeup, signal/webhook, delivery, approval transport, stage attempt ledger, query projection, and execution history for Full OPL readiness.
owner_semantics.domain_owner: Domain supervision owner responsible for progress truth, quality gates, and recovery judgment.
owner_semantics.executor_owner: Concrete executor owner responsible for domain work output and local side effects.
